\authorRemark{This author remark is here on purpose: it renders in
  bold blue under editMode and is suppressed otherwise. Its visible
  presence in the compiled PDF is the user-facing consequence the
  UF-D1 rule warns about; leaving it in for submission would ship
  in-line editing annotations into the final document.}
\editorRemark{Same story for editor remarks (rendered red).}
\end{document}
